name: test-case-generator
description: 从需求文档（文字、图片、PDF、DOCX）生成结构化的功能测试用例。遵循 15 字段规范，输出 Excel 文件，支持正向/异常场景、边界值、安全性测试。
capabilities: Parses requirements from text, images, PDF, and DOCX formats
Generates structured test cases following 15-field specification
Covers normal flow, boundary values,异常 scenarios, and security testing
Exports formatted Excel files with proper styling
Calculates test case statistics and provides summary reports
Identifies missing information and asks clarifying questions
author: Devliang24
securitySummary: Pure prompt-based Claude skill containing only documentation files (README.md, SKILL.md, resources/*.md). No executable code, no network requests, no filesystem modifications. All static findings are false positives caused by the analyzer misidentifying markdown syntax and Chinese Unicode characters as security risks.
valueStatement: Writing test cases from requirement documents takes significant time and often misses edge cases. This skill analyzes requirements in any format (text, images, PDF, DOCX) and automatically generates comprehensive, standardized test cases following 15-field specification with Excel export.
limitations: Does not execute test cases or interact with test systems
Cannot access external APIs or databases for test data
Output is limited to Excel format (other formats require manual conversion)
Relies on quality of input requirements for test case completeness

useCases.title: Accelerate test case authoring
useCases.description: Transform requirement documents into comprehensive test cases in minutes instead of hours

useCases.title: Validate requirement completeness
useCases.description: Generate test cases to identify gaps in requirements before development begins

useCases.title: Understand edge cases early
useCases.description: Review generated test cases to anticipate and handle edge scenarios during implementation

promptTemplates.title: Basic test generation
promptTemplates.prompt:
请根据以下需求文档生成测试用例：

[粘贴需求文档内容]

promptTemplates.title: Include security focus
promptTemplates.prompt: 请根据此需求文档生成测试用例，重点关注安全测试场景，包括认证、授权和数据保护方面的测试用例。

promptTemplates.title: Control test count
promptTemplates.prompt: 请根据此需求文档生成测试用例，用例数量控制在20-30条左右，确保覆盖主要功能和异常场景。

promptTemplates.title: Request detailed steps
promptTemplates.prompt: 请根据此需求文档生成详细的测试用例，每个用例步骤都要非常具体，包含所有必要的操作细节和验证点。

bestPractices: Provide complete requirement details including business rules, error messages, and validation constraints
Specify the desired test case count or focus areas when submitting large requirements
Review and validate generated test cases against actual system behavior
Use the clarification questions feature when requirements are incomplete
antiPatterns: Submitting vague or incomplete requirements and expecting complete test coverage
Relying solely on AI-generated test cases without human review
Ignoring the clarification questions when important details are missing
Using generated test cases as direct test scripts without adaptation

faq.question: What formats does the skill accept for requirements?
faq.answer: Accepts plain text, Markdown, images (flowcharts, UI designs), PDF documents, and DOCX files.

faq.question: How many test cases are typically generated?
faq.answer: Automatically generates 10-50 test cases based on requirement complexity, ensuring comprehensive coverage.

faq.question: Can I export to formats other than Excel?
faq.answer: Default output is Excel. For other formats like CSV or Markdown, request conversion after generation.

faq.question: Is my requirement data stored or shared?
faq.answer: No data is stored. All processing occurs within the Claude session and files are downloaded locally.

faq.question: Why are clarification questions sometimes asked?
faq.answer: The skill identifies missing information critical for executable test cases and asks up to 5 clarifying questions.

faq.question: How does this compare to manual test case writing?
faq.answer: Reduces hours of work to minutes while ensuring standardized output follows industry best practices.
